revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初六]][[zh:十二月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 6|qq=December 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 6''' is the 6th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}}. == Events == * {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|694|en|694|qid=Q23483|lt=694|1=694}} {{ill|December 27|en|December 27|qid=Q2800|lt=December 27|1=December 27}}) – {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} relocated the capital from {{ill|Asuka Jōmiya-no-miya|ja|飛鳥浄御原宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka Jōmiya-no-miya|1=Asuka Kiyomihara Palace|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1744010}} to {{ill|Fujiwara-kyō|en|Fujiwara-kyō|qid=Q1196381|lt=Fujiwara-kyō|1=Fujiwara-kyō}} (Capital Relocation). * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1214|en|1214|qid=Q5358|lt=1214|1=1214}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – Due to a series of earthquakes, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kenryaku|en|Kenryaku|qid=Q1194260|lt=Kenryaku|1=Kenryaku}} to {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}}. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1721|en|1721|qid=Q6913|lt=1721|1=1721}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – At Osaka’s Takemoto-za, a puppet 【Joruri】 play by {{ill|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|en|Chikamatsu Monzaemon|qid=Q324986|lt=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon}} titled {{ill|The Love Suicides at Amijima|en|The Love Suicides at Amijima|qid=Q892307|lt=Shinju Tenamashima|1=The Love Suicides at Amijima}} was first performed. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}}) – {{ill|Mizuno Tadakuni|en|Mizuno Tadakuni|qid=Q2975848|lt=Mizuno Tadakuni|1=Mizuno Tadakuni}} assumed the position of chief {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}}. == Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|qid=Q2912|lt=December 31|1=December 31}}) – {{ill|Hirata Kanetane|en|Hirata Kanetane|qid=Q6537446|lt=Hirata Tetsuten|1=Hirata Kanetane}}, a kokugakuist (died {{ill|1880|en|1880|qid=Q7806|lt=1880|1=1880}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828|1=1828}} {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}}) – {{ill|Iida Takegoto|ja|飯田武郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iida Takegoto|1=Iida Takesato|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6535088}}, a kokugakuist (died {{ill|1900|en|1900|qid=Q2034|lt=1900|1=1900}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – {{ill|Tōten Miyazaki|en|Tōten Miyazaki|qid=Q711712|lt=Miyazaki Tōten|1=Tōten Miyazaki}}, a revolutionary activist who supported the Xinhai Revolution (died {{ill|1922|en|1922|qid=Q2165|lt=1922|1=1922}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Ann'ei|1=Emperor Annei}} 39th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|510 BC|en|510 BC|qid=Q176530|lt=510 BC|1=510 BC}} {{ill|January 17|en|January 17|qid=Q2264|lt=January 17|1=January 17}}) – {{ill|Emperor Annei|en|Emperor Annei|qid=Q313345|lt=Emperor Ann'ei|1=Emperor Annei}}, the 3rd Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|577 BC|en|577 BC|qid=Q1059071|lt=577 BC|1=577 BC}}). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|qid=Q6872|lt=1634|1=1634}} {{ill|January 5|en|January 5|qid=Q2202|lt=January 5|1=January 5}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tadanaga|en|Tokugawa Tadanaga|qid=Q1135700|lt=Tokugawa Tadanaga|1=Tokugawa Tadanaga}}, the third son of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} and lord of the {{ill|Sunpu Domain|en|Sunpu Domain|qid=Q3034530|lt=Suruga Domain|1=Sunpu Domain}} (born {{ill|1606|en|1606|qid=Q6747|lt=1606|1=1606}}). * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1701|en|1701|qid=Q6814|lt=1701|1=1701}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Mitsukuni|ja|徳川光綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Mitsukuni|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, also known as {{ill|Mito Kōmon|ja|水戸黄門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mito Kōmon|1=stories of Mito Kōmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11129919}}, the 2nd lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (born {{ill|1628|en|1628|qid=Q6840|lt=1628|1=1628}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|5|12|7|11|6|1|12|1206|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[cdo:12 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 6 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 6일]] [[ja:12月6日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初六]]
[[ar:December 6 (Lunisolar)]]
